component.name: Rezeptor
component.summary: Install and run Windows software on Linux with tested recipes

description.p: Rezeptor is a desktop launcher for tested Wine recipes powered by Proton-GE. Install, repair, validate, launch, and uninstall applications such as Photoshop, tax software, and Steam games with online fixes.
User data and Wine prefixes are stored under ~/.local/share/wine-software/. Bring-your-own-installer paths need home filesystem access (granted by default).
